# miniz 3.1.1 Upstream Snapshot

This directory preserves the unmodified upstream miniz 3.1.1 source archive for
provenance and audit comparison.

- Source: `https://github.com/richgel999/miniz/archive/refs/tags/3.1.1.zip`
- Stored archive: `miniz-3.1.1-source.zip`
- Integrity file: `SHA256SUMS`

The build does not compile this archive directly. SuperZip builds the reviewed
and patched production copy in `third_party/miniz`.
